title: ABB India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ABB India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
